title: Tern A7 Folding Bike — For Sale
summary: Tern A7 folding bike in good condition. 20" wheels, 7-speed, folds easily, rear rack. Goes on trains free.
story: This has been a genuinely useful bike — it folds down in seconds, goes on the train without a ticket, and the rack takes a pannier for shopping or commuting. I've now got a bike with a child seat on it, so this one isn't getting the use it deserves.

whatsapp.preferred_message: Hi! I'm interested in your Tern A7. Is it still available?

specs: 20" wheels — under the size limit, so it travels free on trains with no bike reservation
7-speed SRAM RevoShift twist grip — shifts easily and cleanly
Folds quickly and compactly for storage, car boots, or under a desk
Rear rack fitted, with a pannier available if you want it
condition: Good condition throughout and everything works as it should. New brake blocks fitted recently. Normal cosmetic marks and paint chips from use — see the photos.
good_points: Folds easily — no fighting with it
Everything works well; gears shift smoothly
Free on trains thanks to the 20" wheels
Good rear rack for panniers or luggage
bad_points: Some chips to the paintwork from use — purely cosmetic
extras: Optional: pannier bag included if the buyer wants it — just ask
availability: Test rides in Oxford. Payment by bank transfer or cash.
